allow: PowerShell($file = "C:\\Users\\souza\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-souza-Documents-python-route-manager\\6019ea61-05b2-46c2-a14c-349f6ecb7e7b.jsonl"; $content = Get-Content $file -Raw; $lines = $content -split "`n"; $last100 = $lines | Select-Object -Last 100; foreach \($line in $last100\) { if \($line -match '"role":"user"' -or \($line -match '"role":"assistant"' -and $line -notmatch '"tool_use"' -and $line -match '"text"'\)\) { try { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($obj.message.content\) { $obj.message.role + ": " + \($obj.message.content | Where-Object { $_.type -eq "text" } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty text\) } } catch {} } })
Bash(python3 scripts/search.py "logistics saas dark theme green teal professional" --design-system -p "Route Manager" -f markdown)
